Q15 MSQ Not checked

Consider the following statements:
I. Every regular set has a LR(1) grammar.
II. Recursive descent parser can not use left recursive grammar.
III. Symbol table is used as data structure in compiler.
Which of the above statement is correct?

Correct answer: D, A
Solution

(d)
Every regular set has a LR(1) grammar.
Symbol table is used in compiler and all the information is kept about token, activation records etc.
Recursive descent parser can use not left recursive grammar but LL(1) can not use.

Q38 MSQ Not checked
Technical • COMPUTER SCIENCE • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Consider the following statements:
(a) Hardwired control unit design is not suitable in design and testing places.
(b) Horizontal micro programmed control unit design is implemented using sum of product expression on a flip-flops.
(c) Vertical micro programmed control unit allows high degree of the parallelism with respect to horizontal μ-program control unit.
(d) In the control unit design control signals are represented in a encoding format/decoding format/SOP format.
Which of the above statements is/are true?

Correct answer: A, D
Solution

(a, d)
• Hardwired control unit design is not suitable in design and testing places because small modification change the working of whole system. So, we have to design again.
• Horizontal control unit design is implemented using sum of product expression on a flipflops.
• Vertical micro programmed control unit allows low degree of the parallelism, whereas
horizontal micro programmed control unit allows high degree of the parallelism.
• In the control unit design control signals are represented in a encoding format/decoding format/SOP format.

Q49 MCQ Not checked
Technical • COMPUTER SCIENCE • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Consider the following statements:
S1 : Empty set Φ is an equivalence relation.
S2 : A relation can never be both symmetric and antisymmetric relation.
S3 : “Divides” relation on the set of positive integers is symmetric.
Which of the above statement is true?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
• Empty set Φ satisfies all properties except reflexive property. Hence false.
• A relation with only self loops, satisfies both symmetric and antisymmetric properties. Hence false.
• The relation “divides” is not symmetric because 1 divides 2, but 2 does not divide 1. Hence false.

Q50 MCQ Not checked
Technical • COMPUTER SCIENCE • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

Which of the following claims correct about strict 2PL?
I. Guaranteed conflict serializability.
II. Guaranteed strict recoverable.
III. Guaranteed deadlock avoidance.

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
Every 2PL is conflict serializable, and every strict 2PL is always guaranteed to be strict recoverable but not deadlock free.

Q57 MSQ Not checked
Technical • COMPUTER SCIENCE • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following statements are true?

Correct answer: A, C, D
Solution

(a, c, d)
• The Kernel does not have any information about the user level threads, therefore it cannot do task switching for user level threads.
• Many to one uses one Kernel thread therefore it cannot use multi processor facility.
• Multiprogramming is used to increase CPU utilization, while timesharing is used to increase CPU responsiveness with user.
• The key idea behind a mid term scheduler is that sometimes it can be advantageous to remove processes from memory and thus reduces the degree of multiprogramming.
